description: Milestone 4B: Create new private message threads. Enable users to start new PM conversations by searching for recipients and composing messages with subject and body. Includes recent recipients, draft auto-save, and FAB entry point.

userStories.title: User Search API Integration
userStories.description: Implement Discourse user search for finding message recipients.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseAPIClient exposes searchUsers(query:) method using GET /u/search/users.json
Search returns username, display name, and avatar URL
Minimum 2 characters required before search executes
Errors map to domain errors with user-friendly messages
Context7 consulted for Discourse user search API; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Recent Recipients Storage
userStories.description: Store recently messaged users for quick access when composing new messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Store up to 10 recent recipient usernames in UserDefaults
Recent recipients updated when sending a new PM
List persists across app restarts
No PII beyond username stored; privacy-safe implementation
Clear recent recipients when user logs out

userStories.title: Recipient Picker UI
userStories.description: Create UI for selecting message recipient from recent contacts or search results.
acceptanceCriteria: Screen shows Recent section with up to 5 recent recipients
Search field at top with debounced search (300ms)
Each row shows avatar initials, display name, @username
Tapping user selects them and proceeds to compose screen
Cancel button returns to Messages tab
Context7 consulted for SwiftUI search/picker patterns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: New Message Compose UI
userStories.description: Create compose screen for new messages with recipient, subject, and body.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows selected recipient at top (avatar + name, tap to change)
Required subject field with Betreff placeholder
Message body reuses M4 composer patterns and safety validation
Send button disabled until subject and body are non-empty
Character count shown for body when approaching limit
Cancel button with confirmation if content exists

userStories.title: Create PM API Integration
userStories.description: Implement Discourse API call to create new private message threads.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseAPIClient exposes createPrivateMessage(recipient:title:content:) method
Uses POST /posts.json with archetype=private_message, target_recipients, title, raw
Success navigates to the new thread detail view
Errors display user-friendly messages
Reuses M4 safety service for rate limiting
Context7 consulted for Discourse create PM endpoint; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Draft Auto-Save
userStories.description: Automatically save in-progress messages to prevent data loss.
acceptanceCriteria: Draft saved to UserDefaults when compose screen disappears
Draft includes recipient username, subject, body, timestamp
Draft restored with prompt when returning to compose
Draft cleared after successful send
Only one draft stored at a time

userStories.title: New Message Entry Point (FAB)
userStories.description: Add floating action button to Messages tab for creating new messages.
acceptanceCriteria: FAB in bottom-right of Messages tab with square.and.pencil icon
FAB uses orange tint matching app theme
FAB only visible when authenticated
Tapping FAB opens recipient picker
FAB positioned with proper safe area handling above tab bar
